---
title: unnecessary-if
description: "Replace boolean-returning if chains."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Replace boolean-returning if chains. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if ready { return true } else { return false }
```

## Good

```go
return ready
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only unnecessary-if`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
